name: Patient Case
history: Worked overseas and built a website related to that work. Recurrent pattern of starting new ideas and later abandoning projects when difficulties arise. Family-related difficulty involving his father; wrote a personal letter as part of a forgiveness process.
intermediate_belief: If I encounter difficulties, I will fail.
intermediate_belief_depression: My past failures mean I will never succeed.
coping_strategies: Avoids completing projects to prevent potential failure.
situation: Reflecting on past achievements alongside current challenges.
auto_thought: I can't handle challenges; I'll just fail again.
